name: spotify-ads
description: Reads Spotify Ads ad accounts, campaigns, ad sets, ads, businesses, business-scoped ad accounts, and assets, and writes campaign mutations through the Spotify Ads API.

risk.read: external Spotify Ads API read of ad account, campaign, ad set, ad, business, and asset data
risk.write: external Spotify Ads API mutation of a campaign's name, purchase order reference, or status (active/paused/archived)
risk.approval: reverse ETL plan approval required before writes; update_campaign can pause or archive live ad spend
